item.title: Author Signings
item.description:
Saturday, June 20, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Mossrose Bookshop, 5441 Almeda Rd, Houston, TX 77004

Meet author Johnny Garza Villa at 2:00pm Help us celebrate Pride Month by welcoming Johnny Garza Villa back to Mossrose Bookshop! Signing & talk will take place at 2:00pm cst.

From Mossrose Bookshop

item.title: Gabbie Hanks in conversation with Stephanie Graves
item.description:
Saturday, June 20, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Murder By The Book, 2342 Bissonnet St, Houston, TX 77005

Gabbie Hanks is a former librarian and now works in literacy for the government. She is an avid psychological suspense reader, and this is her debut novel. Stephanie Graves is the author of th...

From Murder By The Book

Event details

item.title: Kimberly McCreight in conversation with Abby Dunn
item.description:
Tuesday, June 23, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Murder By The Book, 2342 Bissonnet St, Houston, TX 77005

Kimberly McCreight is the New York Times bestselling author of Reconstructing Amelia, Where They Found Her, A Good Marriage, Friends Like These, and Like Mother, Like Daughter, as well as a young a...

From Murder By The Book

Event details

item.title: Mossrose Book Club
item.description:
Thursday, June 25, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Mossrose Bookshop, 5441 Almeda Rd, Houston, TX 77004

Join us in store for our first book club! This month we will be reading You Had Me at Hola by Alexis Daria. Buy your book in store or support us through Bookshop.org to have it delivered OR Libro.FM if you'd rather an audiobook version! Meet us at 6:30pm and the club discussions will start promptly at 7pm!

From Mossrose Bookshop

item.title: Allison Brennan
item.description:
Saturday, June 27, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Murder By The Book, 2342 Bissonnet St, Houston, TX 77005

ALLISON BRENNAN is the New York Times and USA Today bestselling author of over fifty novels, including the Lucy Kincaid and Max Revere series. She was nominated for Best Paperback Original Thriller...

Location: Murder By The Book, 2342 Bissonnet St, Houston, TX 77005
